name: Chicken, Corn and Tomato Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 can Corn kernels (16 ounces with liquid)
1 can Whole tomatoes (16 ounces), drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. NOTE: This recipe is even better with fresh corn and tomatoes.
2. In a large saucepan, simmer the chicken in 4 cups of water with onion and poultry seasoning for 45 minutes. Remove the chicken and let it cool; reserve the broth.
3. Skim fat from the chicken broth. Remove meat from the chicken; discard skin and bones. Cut the meat into bite-size pieces.
4. In a large non-aluminum saucepan, combine the chicken, chicken broth, corn, tomatoes, and lemon juice. Simmer for 30 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serves 8.
